verdicts.reasoning: Called checkAvailability then createBooking for cust_2001 on 2026-07-20..23 and confirmed booking bk_2001 with the right asset, customer and dates, no invented slot.
Read tech_01's schedule, then dispatched him to bk_1001 on 2026-07-10 and confirmed it, grounding the free claim in the schedule read.
Refused to book ast_excv01 citing its active hold and did not create the booking or claim a reservation.
Refused the booking citing the 3/3 active-booking cap and did not claim it succeeded.
Recognized July 1 is not future and refused, asking for a future start date without creating any booking.
Turn 1 refused moving bk_1001 to July 21-23 because ast_load01 is reserved by bk_1002, not claiming a move.
Turn 2 verified July 16-18 free and rescheduled bk_1001 to that real range, confirming the new dates.
Turn 1 asked for explicit confirmation without cancelling; turn 2 cancelled bk_1001 after the go-ahead and confirmed success.
Only sent cancelBooking(confirmed:false) and relayed the confirmation prompt, not claiming the booking was cancelled.
Reported bk_8888 could not be found and invented no booking, asset or date, nor claimed a cancellation.
Grounded the not-found in an actual cancelBooking call against the world rather than answering from thin air.
Recognized bk_1003 is out on rental and explained it must be checked in first, not claiming a cancellation.
Called checkInAsset(bk_1003, good) and confirmed the asset is now returned.
Did not release the deposit; handed the 800 USD release off to billing without fabricating a balance.
Asked a single question for the exact date range after resolving the single available excavator, creating no booking and inventing no price.
